question:
Minimize the objective function c^T * x where 
c = [ 15.  -2.  -8.  -3.  -3.  28. -29.], subject to the constraints 
A * x <= b, where 
A = [[-3. -2.  1.  3. -1.  0.  2.]
 [-1. -4. -1.  2. -3. -3.  4.]
 [-3.  1. -2. -3.  1. -4.  3.]
 [ 3.  2.  4.  1.  1. -4.  3.]] and 
b = [ -1. -22. -29.  21.]. What is the optimal value?

Consider the optimization problem: minimize f(w) = p^T * w 
with p = [-4. 17.], under the constraints 
G * w <= q, where 
G = [[ 3.  1.]
 [-3.  3.]
 [-1. -2.]
 [ 2. -3.]
 [ 0.  3.]
 [-2. -2.]
 [ 4. -3.]
 [-3.  4.]
 [ 4. -2.]
 [-3. -3.]] and 
q = [ 4.  3. -3. -1.  3. -4.  1.  5.  4. -5.]. What is the minimum value achieved?
